title: dichondra repens var. sericea
intro: Dichondra repens var. sericea, also known as silver ponyfoot, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Dichondra repens var. sericea include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections, as well as its use in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
